key.name: window-width
key.summary: Window width

key.name: window-height
key.summary: Window height

key.name: mount-location
key.summary: Directory where libraries are mounted

key.name: cache-mode
key.summary: rclone VFS cache mode for mounts
key.description: 'full' caches opened files on demand (recommended); 'minimal' streams with the least local disk use.

key.name: mount-layout
key.summary: Where libraries mount relative to the mount location
key.description: 'one-folder' mounts every library as a subfolder of the single mount location; 'individual' lets each account choose its own mount folder.

key.name: default-sync-type
key.summary: Default file sync type used when an account enables file sync
key.description: 'stream' mounts libraries on demand (no local copy); 'full' keeps a two-way synced offline copy on disk.

key.name: autostart
key.summary: Start Cloudy automatically at login

key.name: offline-sync-enabled
key.summary: Master switch for per-account two-way offline sync
key.description: When off, no background rclone bisync runs even if individual accounts have “Sync files offline” turned on.

key.name: window-maximized
key.summary: Window maximized state

key.name: enabled-modules
key.summary: Identifiers of enabled service modules
key.description: Which modules the module engine should activate at startup.

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.summary: Show desktop notifications for new mail and upcoming events

key.name: notify-level
key.summary: Which notifications interrupt with a banner
key.description: 'all' notifies for everything immediately; 'digest' notifies for direct (1:1) chats, important mail and calendar reminders immediately but batches group-chat chatter and ordinary mail into a periodic summary; 'priority' notifies only for the direct/important ones — group-chat chatter and ordinary mail update the badges silently.

key.name: notify-respect-system-dnd
key.summary: Honour the system Do Not Disturb state
key.description: When on, no banners are raised while GNOME's Do Not Disturb is active (badges still update). Reads org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners.

key.name: quiet-hours-enabled
key.summary: Silence notification banners during a nightly window

key.name: quiet-hours-start
key.summary: Quiet hours start time (HH:MM, local)

key.name: quiet-hours-end
key.summary: Quiet hours end time (HH:MM, local)

key.name: run-in-background
key.summary: Keep running in the background when the window is closed
key.description: When on, closing the window hides it and Cloudy keeps running (tray / Background Apps); use Quit to exit fully.

key.name: eds-publish-enabled
key.summary: Publish events into the GNOME Shell calendar (Evolution Data Server)
key.description: Mirrors your Cloudy calendar events into a local "Cloudy" calendar so they show in the GNOME top-bar calendar. Best-effort; requires EDS.

key.name: nautilus-extension-enabled
key.summary: Show Cloudy mounts and sync status in the GNOME Files sidebar
key.description: When on, the host Nautilus extension is installed so Cloudy's mounted drives and sync emblems appear in GNOME Files. Turning it off removes the per-user extension. Restart Files for the change to take effect.

key.name: accounts
key.summary: Configured accounts, serialized as a JSON array
key.description: Non-secret account metadata (id, display name, provider, module). Tokens are stored separately via libsecret.

key.name: microsoft-client-id
key.summary: Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) public client/application ID
key.description: OAuth public client ID for Microsoft Graph sign-in. Ships empty; set to the project's multi-tenant client ID, or override with the CLOUDY_MS_CLIENT_ID environment variable. See docs/AUTH.md.

key.name: google-client-id
key.summary: Google OAuth client ID
key.description: OAuth client ID for Gmail/Calendar sign-in (override env: CLOUDY_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID). See docs/AUTH.md.

key.name: google-client-secret
key.summary: Google OAuth client secret (Desktop app)
key.description: Google "Desktop app" OAuth clients include a non-confidential client secret used in the token exchange (override env: CLOUDY_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET). See docs/AUTH.md.
